theorem RCLike.norm_I {K : Type u_1} [RCLike K] : ‖(RCLike.I : K)‖ = if RCLike.I ≠ (0 : K) then 1 else 0 := by
  split_ifs with h
  · apply RCLike.norm_I_of_ne_zero h
  · push_neg at h
    simpa

theorem RCLike.norm_I {K : Type u_1} [RCLike K] : ‖(RCLike.I : K)‖ = if RCLike.I ≠ (0 : K) then 1 else 0 := by
  split_ifs with h
  · -- Case where RCLike.I ≠ 0, so we need to show ‖RCLike.I‖ = 1
    apply RCLike.norm_I_of_ne_zero h
  · -- Case where RCLike.I = 0, so we need to show ‖RCLike.I‖ = 0
    push_neg at h
    simpa using h
